mapper.sql: select p.project_id, p.project_name, p.project_code, p.description, p.status, p.priority, p.budget, p.requirement_count, p.investment, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.real_start_date, p.real_end_date, p.progress, p.owner_id, p.owner_name, p.team_id, (select pm.team_name from project_member pm where pm.team_id = p.team_id limit 1) as team_name, p.board_style, p.col_width, p.display_cards, p.fluid_board, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.del_flag from project p
mapper.select: select p.project_id, p.project_name, p.project_code, p.description, p.status, p.priority, p.budget, p.requirement_count, p.investment, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.real_start_date, p.real_end_date, p.progress, p.owner_id, p.owner_name, p.team_id, (select pm.team_name from project_member pm where pm.team_id = p.team_id limit 1) as team_name, p.board_style, p.col_width, p.display_cards, p.fluid_board, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.del_flag from project p where project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.insert:
insert into project
project_name, project_code, description, status, priority, budget, requirement_count, investment, start_date, end_date, real_start_date, real_end_date, progress, owner_id, owner_name, team_id, board_style, col_width, display_cards, fluid_board, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag,
#{projectName}, #{projectCode}, #{description}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{budget}, #{requirementCount}, #{investment}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{realStartDate}, #{realEndDate}, #{progress}, #{ownerId}, #{ownerName}, #{teamId}, #{boardStyle}, #{colWidth}, #{displayCards}, #{fluidBoard}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{delFlag},
mapper.delete:
delete from project where project_id in
#{projectId}

delete from project_module where project_id in
#{projectId}
mapper.insert:
insert into project_module( module_id, project_id, module_name, parent_id, order_num, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag) values
( #{item.moduleId}, #{item.projectId}, #{item.moduleName}, #{item.parentId}, #{item.orderNum}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.delFlag})
mapper.select: select project_id, status, end_date from project where del_flag = 0 order by create_time desc
select case status when 0 then '进行中' when 1 then '已完成' when 2 then '暂停' when 3 then '已取消' else '未知' end as statusName, count(*) as count from project where del_flag = 0 group by status

select p.project_id as projectId, p.project_name as projectName, p.project_code as projectCode, p.status, p.priority, p.progress, p.owner_name as ownerName, p.create_time as createTime from project p where p.del_flag = 0 order by p.create_time desc limit #{limit}
select p.project_id as projectId, p.project_name as projectName from project p where p.del_flag = 0 and p.status != 1 order by p.create_time desc

select p.project_name as projectName, count(r.req_id) as completedCount from project p left join requirement r on p.project_id = r.project_id and r.del_flag = 0 and r.status in (2, 3) and YEAR(r.update_time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) where p.del_flag = 0 group by p.project_id, p.project_name having completedCount > 0 order by completedCount desc limit 10

select count(*) as totalRequirements, sum(case when status in (2, 3) then 1 else 0 end) as completedRequirements, sum(case when status in (0, 1) then 1 else 0 end) as activeRequirements, sum(case when status in (2, 3) and MONTH(update_time) = MONTH(CURDATE()) and YEAR(update_time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) then 1 else 0 end) as thisMonthCompleted, sum(case when MONTH(create_time) = MONTH(CURDATE()) and YEAR(create_time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) then 1 else 0 end) as thisMonthNew from requirement where project_id = #{projectId} and del_flag = 0

select DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') as month, count(*) as newCount, sum(case when status in (2, 3) then 1 else 0 end) as completedCount from requirement where project_id = #{projectId} and del_flag = 0 and create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) group by DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') order by month asc
